runTitle: Vercel targeted QA - AI metric ranking hotfix
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production guest session -> dashboard -> AI sidebar flow
AI sidebar query: 현재 CPU가 가장 높은 서버 알려줘
AI sidebar query: 현재 메모리 사용률 상위 3대 알려줘
CPU ranking response returns the top server with direct metric lookup metadata
Memory Top 3 response preserves descending order after ranking-answer fix

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production QA; effective usage 11.0956 USD, billed 0.0000 USD. No unexpected usage spike was observed.

completedImprovements.title: Current metric ranking query routes to deterministic metric lookup
completedImprovements.evidence: Production QA: '현재 CPU가 가장 높은 서버 알려줘' returned lb-haproxy-dc1-01 85% with analysis basis showing direct metric lookup.

completedImprovements.title: Ranking answers preserve descending order from tool output
completedImprovements.evidence: Production QA: '현재 메모리 사용률 상위 3대 알려줘' returned 72% -> 71% -> 70% in descending order.

wontFixImprovements.title: Memory top-N query should expose deterministic metric-ranking path instead of filter fallback metadata
wontFixImprovements.note: Production QA still showed '도구: 서버 필터링' in analysis basis for the memory top-3 query, even though the returned ranking order was correct.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: CPU ranking query was rechecked after ai-engine redeploy and returned lb-haproxy-dc1-01 as the highest CPU server.
Memory top-3 query returned descending values (72%, 71%, 70%) on production after the ranking-answer fix.
Console log remained clean during the targeted Vercel AI sidebar session (0 errors / 0 warnings).
The memory top-3 response path still surfaced filterServers-style metadata in the analysis basis; treat this as a non-blocking follow-up rather than a user-facing correctness failure.
